final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing product shot for a MacBook Pro e-commerce hero image.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, clean tech aesthetic, Apple-style product imagery
Composition: eye-level product shot, centered MacBook Pro at slight angle, 50mm equivalent lens, shallow depth of field
Subject: MacBook Pro with screen displaying creative software interface, wireless earbuds case and ceramic coffee cup placed beside
Scene/backdrop: minimal white marble desk surface, soft window light from left, clean uncluttered environment
Lighting/mood: natural daylight streaming from left window, soft diffused light, bright and airy atmosphere
Color palette: neutral white and gray base, warm wood or metal accents from accessories, screen glow as subtle highlight
Materials/textures: smooth cold-pressed marble with subtle veining, brushed aluminum laptop finish, matte ceramic cup, soft fabric or plastic earbud case
Avoid: cluttered background, harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, watermark, generic stock photo look, 8K stuffer words
